caseStudies.code.summary: A seamless AI-assisted coding environment for engineering teams. AI Coding Compute Carpool routes Claude / Codex through one unified API for real-time code review — protecting quality and velocity.
caseStudies.code.title: Continuous Code Review & Optimization Workflow
caseStudies.commerce.summary: Powering cross-border independent storefronts. One unified API plugs into multiple models to produce high-converting copy and imagery, while AI compute quota is purchased and allocated automatically.
caseStudies.commerce.title: Rapid AI Marketing Asset Supply for DTC Brands
caseStudies.video.summary: Concept to finished video, fast. Sora-2's high-fidelity generation handles the creative work; all calls flow through a unified API gateway for clean billing and ops.
caseStudies.video.title: End-to-end AI Video Content Pipeline
cases.description: Explore how products in the LIONCC.AI ecosystem combine to deliver efficient, open, and automated AI solutions.

claude.hint: Click the domain to enter the system, or use the button below to view the illustrated tutorial.
claude.steps: Enter card code → Fetch Claude sessionKey → Recharge complete

pages.privacy.intro: Welcome to LIONCC.AI ("we", "us"). We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and safeguard the information you provide when using our services.
pages.privacy.notice: This Privacy Policy may be updated from time to time. Material changes will be announced on our website. We recommend reviewing this policy periodically.
pages.privacy.s1.title: 1. Information We Collect
pages.privacy.s1_1.intro: When you visit our website, we automatically collect certain information, including:
pages.privacy.s1_1.li4: Access timestamps, pages visited, and time spent
pages.privacy.s1_1.title: 1.1 Access Data
pages.privacy.s1_2.body: We use cookies and similar technologies to improve your experience. Cookies are small text files stored on your device.
pages.privacy.s1_2.title: 1.2 Cookies and Similar Technologies
pages.privacy.s2.intro: We use the collected information to:
pages.privacy.s2.li2: Analyze site usage and optimize performance
pages.privacy.s2.li4: Comply with legal and regulatory requirements
pages.privacy.s2.title: 2. How We Use Information
pages.privacy.s3.intro: Our website uses the following third-party services:
pages.privacy.s3.note: These third-party services may collect and use your information. We recommend reviewing their respective privacy policies.
pages.privacy.s3.title: 3. Third-party Services
pages.privacy.s4.intro: We take reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information, including:
pages.privacy.s4.title: 4. Data Security
pages.privacy.s5.intro: You have the following rights regarding your personal information:
pages.privacy.s5.li1: Right of access: view the personal data we hold about you
pages.privacy.s5.li2: Right to erasure: request deletion of your personal data
pages.privacy.s5.li3: Right to rectification: correct inaccurate personal data
pages.privacy.s5.title: 5. Your Rights
pages.privacy.s6.body: We retain your personal data only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes described in this Privacy Policy.
pages.privacy.s6.title: 6. Data Retention
pages.privacy.s7.intro: If you have any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy, contact us via:
pages.privacy.s7.note: Or visit our homepage for more information.
pages.privacy.s7.title: 7. Contact Us
pages.terms.intro: Please read these Terms of Service ("Terms") carefully. By accessing or using LIONCC.AI and its related services ("Services"), you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you disagree, please do not use our Services.
pages.terms.notice: By using our Services, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, please stop using our Services.
pages.terms.s1.intro: LIONCC.AI is an AI infrastructure platform offering, among others:
pages.terms.s1.li5: Other related AI tools and services
pages.terms.s1.title: 1. Service Description
pages.terms.s2.intro: When using our Services, you agree to:
pages.terms.s2.li1: Comply with all applicable laws and regulations
pages.terms.s2.li2: Not use the Services for any illegal or unauthorized activity
pages.terms.s2.li3: Not harm the security or integrity of the Services
pages.terms.s2.li4: Not interfere with other users' use of the Services
pages.terms.s2.li5: Take responsibility for any activity conducted under your account
pages.terms.s2.title: 2. User Responsibilities
pages.terms.s3.body1: This website and all of its content, including but not limited to text, graphics, logos, icons, and software, are the property of LIONCC.AI or its licensors and are protected by intellectual property laws.
pages.terms.s3.body2: You may not copy, modify, distribute, or otherwise use any content from this website without our express written permission.
pages.terms.s3.title: 3. Intellectual Property

pages.terms.s4_1.body: We make no express or implied warranties regarding the accuracy, completeness, timeliness, or availability of the Services.
pages.terms.s4_1.title: 4.1 Services Provided "As Is"
pages.terms.s4_2.body: You understand and agree that using the Services involves certain risks. You are responsible for any losses arising from your use of the Services.
pages.terms.s4_2.title: 4.2 Use at Your Own Risk
pages.terms.s5.intro: We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or terminate the Services at any time, including but not limited to:
pages.terms.s5.note: We will provide reasonable advance notice when feasible.
pages.terms.s5.title: 5. Service Changes and Termination

pages.terms.s6.title: 6. Third-party Links
pages.terms.s7.body: Any disputes arising from use of the Services should be resolved through good-faith negotiation. If negotiation fails, both parties agree to submit the dispute to the courts of the People's Republic of China.

pages.terms.s9.title: 9. Contact Us
productDescriptions.api: A unified gateway for large models. Plug in GPT, Claude, Gemini, and more with one key — affordable, reliable, ready to ship.
productDescriptions.batchImage: Generate AI images at scale. Supports concurrent API calls, automatic retries, and progress tracking — for content teams that ship a lot.
productDescriptions.chatgptSub: Two independent entry points for ChatGPT Plus top-ups. They differ only in domain and card-code format; each has its own backend and tutorial.
productDescriptions.claudeSub: Self-service top-up for Claude subscriptions. Enter your card code, fetch the session key, and Claude recharges automatically — same flow as the ChatGPT system.
productDescriptions.codeCarPool: Officially licensed. Bundles Claude Code / Codex compute into stable, cost-effective AI coding access for teams.
productDescriptions.gemini: Powered by Gemini API. Generate storyboards, edit images, draft video concept frames — accelerate your visual content pipeline.
productDescriptions.lab: LIONCC.AI's R&D incubator. Beta-stage AI tools, algorithms, and applications — try them first and shape what we build next.
productDescriptions.lionkit: Your AI creation workshop. GPT Image 2 nails text and characters; Nano Banana captures fleeting ideas. 512px–4K native rendering, sub-second response, 4-thread concurrency, multi-image editing. Plug in your vibecodingapi.ai key and ship.
productDescriptions.selfService: An automated marketplace for digital products. Buy API quota, software licenses, and more 24/7 — instant, secure, hands-off delivery.
productDescriptions.sora: Leading text-to-video service. Turn text prompts into high-resolution, expressive video content.
productDescriptions.vibeCommunity: VibeCodingAPI's online GPT Image 2 generator. Comes with a curated prompt library from X creators, supports text-to-image, reference-image editing, and custom sizes — a great way to pick up prompt-craft skills.
products.subtitle: We believe the future belongs to connection.
products.subtitleBreak: LIONCC.AI seamlessly stitches AI coding, compute, and AIGC into one efficient, open, boundless workflow.
products.title: Our AI Product Matrix
subscription.chatgptplus.title: ChatGPT Plus Account Top-up System
subscription.entryDescription: Best for ChatGPT Plus membership top-ups. This entry has its own domain, card-code format, and tutorial.
subscription.gptplus.title: ChatGPT Account Top-up System
subscription.modal.description: Each product has its own domain, top-up system, and tutorial. Compare use cases and processes before entering the matching system.
subscription.modal.title: Choose Product Entry
tutorials.desc.chatgptPlus: Top up a ChatGPT Plus subscription via card-code redemption and Token verification. Both video walkthrough and full illustrated steps are provided — handy for first-time use.
tutorials.desc.claude: Top up a Claude subscription via card-code redemption and sessionKey verification. Full illustrated steps cover both manual F12 and browser-extension token retrieval — handy for first-time use.
tutorials.desc.gptplusFree: Top up a ChatGPT account via card-code redemption and Token verification. Both video walkthrough and full illustrated steps are provided — handy for first-time use.
